name: Ariya Hansen
ai_summary: Ariya Hansen has hands-on experience caring for her three-year-old nonverbal brother on the spectrum and values helping children learn through engaging activities. She offers flexible availability (except Tuesday/Wednesday afternoons) and uses a calm, listening approach to resolve conflicts between children.
